# Content form codes

| Code | Form |
|---|---|
| THD | Talking head |
| TUT | Tutorial / how-to |
| SCR | Screen recording / software |
| POD | Podcast / interview clip |
| STI | Street interview |
| SKT | Skit / comedy |
| MEM | Meme / remix / reaction |
| PRD | Product demo |
| UGC | UGC ad |
| LIV | Livestream clip |
| GAM | Gaming clip |
| FIT | Fitness |
| FOD | Food / recipe |
| BEA | Beauty / fashion |
| NEW | News / commentary |
| STY | Storytime |
| BTS | Behind the scenes |
| CAS | Case study / teardown |
| CMP | Comparison / review |
| MOG | Motion graphic / carousel-style video |

Use content-form codes in video briefs and experiment names.

Example:

```text
VID-20260421-TT-FYP-SCR-RETENTIONCLINIC-003
```
